title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: Google DeepMind announced that SynthID, an imperceptible watermarking technology for AI-generated content, is expanding to additional partners. The tool embeds watermarks in AI-generated outputs to enable detection of synthetic content.
